name: cutctx
description: Automatic context compression and retrieval for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Compress large context automatically in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Cutctx keeps Codex sessions lean by compressing bulky outputs, preserving retrievable hashes, and restoring exact details only when needed.
defaultPrompt: Use $cutctx automatically for large outputs and logs.
Use $cutctx to retrieve exact details only when needed.
